calculator.description: Evaluate mathematical expressions, perform calculations with basic arithmetic, trigonometry, and logarithms
calculator.author: Chat UI Team

pptx_generator.description: Convert markdown content into professional PowerPoint presentations with 16:9 aspect ratio, bullet points, and optional image integration
pptx_generator.author: Chat UI Team

prompts.description: Specialized system prompts for AI behavior modification
prompts.author: Chat UI Team

tool_planner.description: Generate bash scripts that accomplish tasks by calling the Atlas CLI with appropriate tools, using MCP sampling for planning
tool_planner.author: Chat UI Team

elicitation_demo.description: User elicitation demo - string, number, boolean, enum, structured, multi-turn
elicitation_demo.author: Chat UI Team

progress_demo.description: Long-running tasks with deterministic progress tracking
progress_demo.author: Chat UI Team

session_state_demo.description: Shopping cart demo using FastMCP 3.x session state (ctx.get_state/ctx.set_state) — state persists across tool calls within a conversation
session_state_demo.author: Chat UI Team

structured_output_demo.description: Demonstrates FastMCP 3.x structured output priority — returns data field for clean UI display instead of raw JSON
structured_output_demo.author: Chat UI Team

task_demo.description: Demonstrates FastMCP 3.x adaptive task polling — tools that can run as background tasks with progress tracking
task_demo.author: Chat UI Team

username-override-demo.description: Demonstrates the security feature where the backend automatically overrides the username parameter with the authenticated user's email
username-override-demo.author: Chat UI Team
